BacktestRunTagsUpdate.description: PUT /api/backtests/{id}/tags body. Replaces the full tag list.
BacktestRunTagsUpdate.title: BacktestRunTagsUpdate

BacktestRunUpdate.description: PATCH /api/backtests/{id} body. Send `null` to clear the name.
BacktestRunUpdate.title: BacktestRunUpdate

PropFirmConfigIn.description:
POST body. Either pass `preset_key` (with optional overrides) or fully
specify every field.
PropFirmConfigIn.title: PropFirmConfigIn

StrategyStagesRead.description:
GET /api/strategies/stages body. Exposes the lifecycle vocabulary so
the frontend pipeline board column order is driven by the backend.
StrategyStagesRead.title: StrategyStagesRead

StrategyUpdate.description:
PATCH /api/strategies/{id} body. Only fields present in the request
are applied; omit a field to leave it untouched.
StrategyUpdate.title: StrategyUpdate

schema.title: Response List Backtests Api Backtests Get

delete.description:
Delete a run and all its children.

ORM relationships are declared with cascade="all, delete-orphan", so
trades, equity_points, run_metrics, and config_snapshot go with it.
Notes keep a nullable FK and are not cascade-deleted — they survive
as floating research notes.

schema.title: Response List Backtest Equity Api Backtests  Backtest Id  Equity Get

put.description: Replace the full tag list on a run. Empty list clears all tags.

schema.title: Response List Backtest Trades Api Backtests  Backtest Id  Trades Get
Response List Notes Api Notes Get
Response List Presets Api Prop Firm Presets Get
Response List Strategies Api Strategies Get

get.description: Lifecycle vocabulary. Frontend pipeline column order.

delete.description:
Delete a strategy and all its versions + runs + children.

Relationships are declared with cascade="all, delete-orphan", so the
whole subtree goes in one shot. Free-floating notes that were attached
to deleted runs survive with a dangling FK.
